---
title: "Service"
description: "Academic service, teaching, and mentoring activities."
---

## Reviewing

### Conferences (selected)

- ICLR (2025, 2026 cycles)
- AAAI (2026 cycle)
- CDC (2024, 2025)
- IFAC-related venues (since 2023)

### Journals (selected)

- IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics: Systems
- IEEE Transactions on Automation Science and Engineering
- IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Vehicles

## Teaching and Mentoring

- Teaching Assistant, **Advanced Process Control** (2023-2024): lectures, assignments, recitations.
- Co-mentoring support: **1 Ph.D.** and **13 M.Sc.** students (topic framing, reproducible pipelines, and engineering replication).

## Collaboration Practice

- Promote methodological clarity, reproducibility, and deployability.
- Bridge research prototypes to production through acceptance tests, release checklists, and retrospective reviews.

## Open-Science Habits

- Keep publication status explicit (published vs. under review vs. in preparation).
- Prefer DOI-linked records and traceable artifacts.
- Maintain implementation-oriented documentation for reproducibility in real systems.
